hero.title: Azerbaijan's Greenhouse Consultancy
hero.subtitle: International-level agronomy support for tomato greenhouses. Dutch, Belgian, and Japanese expertise — adapted to local conditions.

positioning.text: Every recommendation is grounded in analysis and field experience. Every package is tied to measurable targets. Our own greenhouse — 8 ha in Baku and Samukh — is our proof base.

stats.yieldLabel: annual yield in our own greenhouse

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: One-time assessment or ongoing oversight — choose the format that fits your greenhouse.

audit.description: Yield gap, risks, and operational fixes — all in one report.

fertilizer.description: Precise recipe aligned to EC/pH, nutrient balance, and crop stage.

climate.description: Day/night regime, VPD management, and ventilation strategy.

pestDisease.description: Early diagnosis, biological and chemical intervention schedule.

irrigation.description: Substrate condition, drainage targets, and radiation-based adjustment.

training.description: Staff monitoring, recording, and decision-making skills.

packages.description: Ongoing consultancy — field visits, reports, all plans in one package.

fullControl.description: Daily agronomic oversight with target-driven execution.

experience.title: 15+ years of local experience
experience.text: Not theory — proven practice in Azerbaijani conditions.

network.title: International expert network
network.text: Delphy, Koppert, Kagome, Proefstation, Groen Agro Control, and Andre Kool.

ownGreenhouse.title: We have our own greenhouse
ownGreenhouse.text: 8 ha tomato greenhouse. See the results firsthand.

noBarrier.title: No language or cultural barriers
noBarrier.text: Every recommendation is delivered in a directly actionable format.

partnersTeaser.title: Our International Expert Network
partnersTeaser.names: Delphy · Andre Kool · Koppert · Proefstation · Kagome · Groen Agro Control

finalCta.title: Want to see your greenhouse's real potential?
finalCta.text: Our manager visits your site, assesses the situation, and provides a health prognosis. No obligation.
